content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.bankr.portfolio
FILE: cosmos/integration/bankr/portfolio.py (260 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Bankr Portfolio Module.

Provides portfolio tracking, balances, and position management.

CLASSES:
- TokenBalance: Token balance information.
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict) -> 'TokenBalance'
- NFT: NFT asset information.
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict) -> 'NFT'
- Portfolio: Complete portfolio summary.
  Methods: def from_response(cls, data: Dict) -> 'Portfolio'
- BankrPortfolio: Portfolio tracking via Bankr API.

Provides:
- Token balance tracking across cha
  Methods: async def get_balance(self, chain: str=None) -> List[TokenBalance]
  Methods: async def get_all_balances(self) -> Dict[str, List[TokenBalance]]
  Methods: async def get_nfts(self, chain: str=None) -> List[NFT]
  Methods: async def get_portfolio(self) -> Portfolio
  Methods: async def get_defi_positions(self) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def get_transaction_history(self, chain: str=None, limit: int=50) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def get_total_value(self) -> Decimal
